# Nuri DS · consumer manifest

Spec pages (HTML · served via gh-pages):
  /pages/principles.html             WHY · cascade · P4 · tier model
  /pages/implementation-guide.html   HOW · web→RN migration
  /pages/foundations/colour/primitive.html      colour tokens · primitive
  /pages/foundations/colour/semantic.html       colour tokens · semantic (mode × accent)
  /pages/foundations/colour/exploration.html    colour tokens · exploration
  /pages/foundations/typography.html                  type scale
  /pages/foundations/dimension/primitive.html         dimension tokens · primitive (--nuri-px-N · 12 leaves)
  /pages/foundations/dimension/spacing.html           dimension tokens · semantic spacing (T-shirt scale)
  /pages/foundations/dimension/sizing.html            dimension tokens · semantic sizing (T-shirt scale)
  /pages/foundations/dimension/radius.html            dimension tokens · semantic radius (T-shirt scale + 9999px sentinel full)
  /pages/foundations/iconography.html                 <nuri-icon> · 17-glyph phosphor registry · 2 sizes + fill · currentColor
  Theming:
  /pages/components/scope.html          <nuri-scope> · Tier 3 theming primitive · web↔RN scope spec · START HERE for migration
  Actions:
  /pages/components/button.html         anatomy · token-mapping · variants · states (canonical template)
  /pages/components/icon-button.html    icon-only action · behavioural delta (F-ARIA-LABEL-1 · F-TOUCH-TARGET-1)
  Layout:
  /pages/components/stack.html          flex stack layout primitive
  /pages/components/box.html            box primitive · bg + radius props
  /pages/components/screen.html         screen scaffold primitive
  /pages/components/scroll.html         scroll container primitive
  /pages/components/spacer.html         flex spacer primitive
  Inputs:
  /pages/components/switch.html         toggle input
  Display:
  /pages/components/typography.html        text component
  /pages/components/typography-stack.html  stacked text component
  /pages/components/icon-avatar.html       icon-in-circle avatar
  /pages/components/separator.html         divider
  Navigation:
  /pages/components/tabs.html           tabs
  /pages/components/topbar.html         top app bar
  /pages/components/tab-bar.html        bottom tab bar
  List:
  /pages/components/list-base.html      presentational + interactive list primitives
  /pages/components/list-nav-item.html  nav-item list recipe

Build assets (dist · fetchable · 5 files · all emitted by `npm run build`):
  /build/tokens.json                 DTCG primitives (W3C standard · 216 colour tokens)
  /build/tokens.ts                   RN-ready · runtime sets · chrome + accent + space + size + radius (38 leaves) + type scale
  /build/components/<name>.ts        per-component numerics + TokenPath references · 8 files: button · icon-button · switch · tabs · list · list-item · list-interactive-item · tab-bar
  /build/token-paths.ts              discriminated union of every runtime-set leaf (38 members)
  /build/icons.ts                    typed glyph registry · IconName union + icons[name][weight] SVG (17 glyphs × 3 weights)

Repository entry points:
  /README.md                         project overview
  /AGENTS.md                         skill router (for spec-authoring)
  /roadmap/index.md                  sessions + current state
  /decisionlog.md                    locked decisions
  /skills/                           per-skill procedures (kebab-case files)
  /prompts/                          reusable agent prompt templates
  /docs/RISKS.md                     open risks with named failure modes
  /docs/migration-tests/             web ↔ RN translation pairs (evidence for R5)

Source of truth: this repo's `styles/` CSS files. HTML pages and
build assets are derived; never edit them directly.
